{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323045913046B290FC3C1CFFEB2EB"}"},"total":712},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7420685629670310718","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，一个经历沧桑冷漠至极的人变得温情需要一个过程，以女主为导火线男主展开了与各种势力周旋，最后希望男女主在一起吧。文采不错写的很好的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727768850,"group_id":"7361298237711469630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7d2E9wC8wxKvBwF+UR9hJ8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"374281601555519","user_name":"用户37428160"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"374281601555519","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7361298237711469630","book_info":{"abstract":"已成为最大军火商的李青，这天突然收到了杨蜜的来信，并且得知，自己有个闺女已经三岁了。
三年前，因为某些原因，杨蜜阴差阳错之下跟李青有了一个孩子。
迫于对赌协议，最危险的时期，杨蜜不得不找到轩宝儿的亲生父亲。
确定是自己孩子之后，身为军火大佬的李青，摇身一变成为了全职奶爸！
只因轩宝儿一句话：“粑粑，我不想麻麻被他们欺负..”
接着，
嘉荇娱乐公司以三块钱被收购！
京圈太子陈阿瑟被打断双腿！
四九城老炮冯裤子，发文道歉，销声匿迹！
娱乐圈迎来换血大清洗！
自此，
沪圈各大资本瑟瑟发抖：
“这位……怕是手眼通天的主。”
京圈大院更是避之不及：“查不到，比查得到更可怕。”
高位圈层：“插手他的事，不见得是好事！”
唯独杨蜜，抱着轩宝儿一脸诧异：“宝贝，你霸霸究竟干啥的？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/20629aee164d974a47b5cb86fb8e956c","author":"清风徐徐来啊","author_id":"","book_id":"7361298237711469630","book_name":"军火大亨回国后的日常生活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7361298313536094782","read_count":"22564","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2887686"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"1385","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,奶爸,娱乐圈,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0112dc4a2764d2fd587c358f1b4e0da8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397153&x-signature=%2Bm2kIAovvBU53P1yKcJq2pk%2B%2Bpc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1574938111119790","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"59"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323045913046B290FC3C1CFFEB2EB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17082,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":26605},"user_action":{"author":0 yds，这本书不能单纯的是说是爽文，刚开始看的时候看前面那一部分，我以为就是神豪奶爸文，但后来看了一两百章才发现，这本书的信息量以及对人物的塑造，有剧情，都远超其他小说。这本书的世界观以及构想非常新颖，非常值得观看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738210294,"group_id":"7361298237711469630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+FbwBuHooCQfuAzrt9NGnZ3w6+gVDN7m8uir00EPErD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3683835348267290","user_name":"用户36838353"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3683835348267290","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7361298237711469630","book_info":{"abstract":"已成为最大军火商的李青，这天突然收到了杨蜜的来信，并且得知，自己有个闺女已经三岁了。
